nasb.text: Do not consider your maidservant as a worthless woman, for I have spoken until now out of my great concern and provocation.”

esv.text: Do not regard your servant as a worthless woman, for all along I have been speaking out of my great anxiety and vexation.”

cnv.text: 不要把你的使女看作不檢點的女子，我因為極度愁苦和激動，才一直傾訴到現在。”

ccb.text: 请不要以为我是堕落的女人，我心中非常悲伤痛苦，所以一直在祷告。”
